query: SELECT id, settingKey, settingValue FROM siteSettings WHERE settingKey LIKE '%logo%' OR settingKey LIKE '%ASTRO%' OR settingKey LIKE '%curly%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user eJpiKG8HujqiSsZ.root --database fy8vMHZMgXLRjRhidtpLfH --execute SELECT id, settingKey, settingValue FROM siteSettings WHERE settingKey LIKE '%logo%' OR settingKey LIKE '%ASTRO%' OR settingKey LIKE '%curly%';
